emails.subject: NRG Asset Management LOI
emails.body: NRG Asset Management LOI Kay: Attached is your draft of the LOI with revisions from the origination team. Please call me with any questions at x37590 or on my mobile at 713.303.4583. As we discussed, we would like to have something ready to send to the counterparty by the end of today. Thanks- Bill

emails.subject: Re: NRG Asset Management LOI
emails.body: Re: NRG Asset Management LOI Looks fine to me. Will you accept the changes and send out? I would like to receive a bcc of whatever goes out, if possible. Thanks, Kay From: William Keeney/ENRON@enronXgate on 06/06/2001 11:40 AM
